zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Tibetot於1365年出生在英國素福爾可內特萊斯亞德時，她的父親Sir Robert Tibetot 3rd Baron Tiptoft24歲，母親Margaret Deincourt22歲。她於1381年11月27日與Roger Scrope 2nd Baron Scrope of Bolton在英國倫敦結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1431年5月14日在英國米德萊可倫敦 阿爾蓋特享年66歲，埋葬在英國米德萊可倫敦 阿爾蓋特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret Tibetot于1365年出生在英国素福爾可內特萊斯亞德时，她的父亲Sir Robert Tibetot 3rd Baron Tiptoft24岁，母亲Margaret Deincourt22岁。她于1381年11月27日与Roger Scrope 2nd Baron Scrope of Bolton在英国倫敦结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1431年5月14日在英国米德萊可倫敦 阿爾蓋特享年66岁，埋葬在英国米德萊可倫敦 阿爾蓋特。

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Tibetot was born in 1365, in Nettlestead, Suffolk, England, her father, Sir Robert Tibetot 3rd Baron Tiptoft, was 24 and her mother, Margaret Deincourt, was 22. She married Roger Scrope 2nd Baron Scrope of Bolton on 27 November 1381, in London, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. She died on 14 May 1431, in London Aldgate, Middlesex, England, at the age of 66, and was buried in London Aldgate, Middlesex, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Tibetot est née en 1365, à Nettlestead, Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, Sir Robert Tibetot 3rd Baron Tiptoft, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Margaret Deincourt, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé Roger Scrope 2nd Baron Scrope of Bolton le 27 novembre 1381, à Londres, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée le 14 mai 1431, à London Aldgate, Middlesex, Angleterre, à l’âge de 66 ans, et a été enterrée à London Aldgate, Middlesex, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret Tibetot 1365 in Nettlestead, Suffolk, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Robert Tibetot 3rd Baron Tiptoft 24 und ihre Mutter Margaret Deincourt 22. Sie hat am 27. November 1381 in London, England Roger Scrope 2nd Baron Scrope of Bolton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb am 14. Mai 1431 im Alter von 66 Jahren in London Aldgate, Middlesex, England und wurde in London Aldgate, Middlesex, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Tibetot è nata il nel 1365 nel Nettlestead, Suffolk, England, sua padre, Sir Robert Tibetot 3rd Baron Tiptoft, aveva 24 anni e sua madre, Margaret Deincourt, aveva 22 anni. Lei sposato Roger Scrope 2nd Baron Scrope of Bolton il 27 novembre 1381, nel London, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 14 maggio 1431, nel London Aldgate, Middlesex, England, all'età di 66 anni, e fu sepolta a London Aldgate, Middlesex, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret Tibetotが1365年にイギリススフォルクネットレステアドで生まれた時，父Sir Robert Tibetot 3rd Baron Tiptoftは24歳，母Margaret Deincourtは22歳であった。1381年11月27日にイギリスロンドンでRoger Scrope 2nd Baron Scrope of Boltonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1431年5月14日にイギリスミッドレセックスロンドン アルドガトで66歳で死去し，イギリスミッドレセックスロンドン アルドガトにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Tibetot(이)가 1365년 영국 수폴크 네틀레스테아드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Robert Tibetot 3rd Baron Tiptoft(은)는 24세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Deincourt(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 1381년 11월 27일 영국 런던에서 Roger Scrope 2nd Baron Scrope of Bolton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1431년 5월 14일 영국 미들레세스 런던 알드가트에서 66세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 미들레세스 런던 알드가트에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Tibetot nasceu em 1365, em Nettlestead, Suffolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Robert Tibetot 3rd Baron Tiptoft, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Deincourt, tinha 22 anos. Ela casou-se com Roger Scrope 2nd Baron Scrope of Bolton em 27 de novembro de 1381, em London, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 14 de maio de 1431, em London Aldgate, Middlesex, Inglaterra, com 66 anos, e foi sepultada em London Aldgate, Middlesex, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Tibetot родилась в 1365 г. в местности неттлестид, суффолк, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Robert Tibetot 3rd Baron Tiptoft было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret Deincourt, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Roger Scrope 2nd Baron Scrope of Bolton 27 ноября 1381 г. в местности Лондон, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла 14 мая 1431 г. в местности лондон алджэит, миддлесекс, Англия в возрасте 66 лет и была похоронена в местности лондон алджэит, миддлесекс, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margaret Tibetot nació en 1365, en Nettlestead, Suffolk, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Robert Tibetot 3rd Baron Tiptoft, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Margaret Deincourt, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Roger Scrope 2nd Baron Scrope of Bolton el 27 de noviembre de 1381, en London, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 14 de mayo de 1431, en London Aldgate, Middlesex, Inglaterra, a la edad de 66 años, y fue sepultada en London Aldgate, Middlesex, Inglaterra.
